/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/game_mode_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/game_mode_solo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/game_mode_multi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/turn_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/input_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/render_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/prediction_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ai_strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ai_easy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ai_medium.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ai_hard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/joker_effect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/ui_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/carte.cpp.o -o app  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-network.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
